TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-dailylife1_Iwan
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: tiku su sunga' ga ga ka'asi nku sami ka maki' i i imuwag ka kakanairin ga su sunga' yu bali iyencL2 bali sukani la.
S.PHON: tiku s~ɕu s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa ɣa kaʔas~ɕi nku s~ɕami ka makiʔ i i imuwaɣ ka kakanairin ɣa s~ɕu s~ɕuŋaʔ ju βali ijenʦ~ʨl* βali s~ɕukani la.
S.FORM: tiku su sunga' ga ga ka'asi nku sami ka maki' i i imuwag ka kakanairin ga su sunga' yu bali iyencL2 bali sukani la.
S.PHON: tiku s~ɕu s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa ɣa kaʔas~ɕi nku s~ɕami ka makiʔ i i imuwaɣ ka kakanairin ɣa s~ɕu s~ɕuŋaʔ ju βali ijenʦ~ʨl* βali s~ɕukani la.
S.TRANSL: 以前,不像現在,我們婦女都住家裡.
Before, not like now, women like us used to live in the house.

S.FORM: ga usu i i numaga' pahapuy ru malahang su ulaqi'.
S.PHON: ɣa us~ɕu i i numaɣaʔ paħapuj ru malaħaŋ s~ɕu ulaqiʔ.
S.FORM: ga usu i i numaga' pahapuy ru malahang su ulaqi'.
S.PHON: ɣa us~ɕu i i numaɣaʔ paħapuj ru malaħaŋ s~ɕu ulaqiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 會作飯並照顧小孩.

TRANSL.notes: (We) will cook and take care of the child.

S.TRANSL: will cook and take care of the child.

S.FORM: ru musa' i ragiyax ku tatamalung i musa' i sumku' su wahi naha' ga.
S.PHON: ru mus~ɕaʔ i raɣijax ku tatamaluŋ i mus~ɕaʔ i s~ɕumkuʔ s~ɕu waħi naħaʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: ru musa' i ragiyax ku tatamalung i musa' i sumku' su wahi naha' ga.
S.PHON: ru mus~ɕaʔ i raɣijax ku tatamaluŋ i mus~ɕaʔ i s~ɕumkuʔ s~ɕu waħi naħaʔ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 而男人則上山放繩製的陷阱.
And men go to the mountains to lay traps with ropes.

S.FORM: nanu' u qumlasay ru manu ka tuminun.
S.PHON: nanuʔ u qumlas~ɕaj ru manu ka tuminun.
S.FORM: nanu' u qumlasay ru manu ka tuminun.
S.PHON: nanuʔ u qumlas~ɕaj ru manu ka tuminun.
S.TRANSL: 整經、繞線,然後編織.

TRANSL.notes: (We) arrange and circle the thread and then weave.

S.TRANSL: arrange and circle the thread and then weave.

S.FORM: ru i ukah ku buwax naha' la ga ukah ku talan ru ukah ku buwax naha' ga sumxu'.
S.PHON: ru i ukaħ ku βuwax naħaʔ la ɣa ukaħ ku talan ru ukaħ ku βuwax naħaʔ ɣa s~ɕumxuʔ.
S.FORM: ru i ukah ku buwax naha' la ga ukah ku talan ru ukah ku buwax naha' ga sumxu'.
S.PHON: ru i ukaħ ku βuwax naħaʔ la ɣa ukaħ ku talan ru ukaħ ku βuwax naħaʔ ɣa s~ɕumxuʔ.
S.TRANSL: 如果看到沒有米了,我們就會搗米.
And when seeing there is no rice, we pound rice .

S.FORM: ini' naiy ku tamalung gi kiya nanak ku waw naha' musa' i i ragiyax.
S.PHON: iniʔ naij ku tamaluŋ ɣi kija nanak ku waw naħaʔ mus~ɕaʔ i i raɣijax.
S.FORM: ini' naiy ku tamalung gi kiya nanak ku waw naha' musa' i i ragiyax.
S.PHON: iniʔ naij ku tamaluŋ ɣi kija nanak ku waw naħaʔ mus~ɕaʔ i i raɣijax.

TRANSL.notes: 不能等男人(來搗米),因為他們自己在山上有工作.

S.TRANSL: 不能等男人 ,因為他們自己在山上有工作.
We don't wait for men because they have their own work in the mountains.

S.FORM: musa' i sumku' sku su wahi naha'.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ i s~ɕumkuʔ s~ɕku s~ɕu waħi naħaʔ.
S.FORM: musa' i sumku' sku su wahi naha'.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ i s~ɕumkuʔ s~ɕku s~ɕu waħi naħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們去放索製的陷阱.
They go to lay traps made with ropes.

S.FORM: ru nanu' naun ru i i muwah la ga nanu' na i naun i.
S.PHON: ru nanuʔ naun ru i i muwaħ la ɣa nanuʔ na i naun i.
S.FORM: ru nanu' naun ru i i muwah la ga nanu' na i naun i.
S.PHON: ru nanuʔ naun ru i i muwaħ la ɣa nanuʔ na i naun i.
S.TRANSL: 他們回來.
And they come back.

S.FORM: i ungi'an la.
S.PHON: i uŋiʔan la.
S.FORM: i ungi'an la.
S.PHON: i uŋiʔan la.
S.TRANSL: 忘了.
forgot.

S.FORM: na naun pahapuy ru sitahuk su raramat.
S.PHON: na naun paħapuj ru s~ɕitaħuk s~ɕu raramat.
S.FORM: na naun pahapuy ru sitahuk su raramat.
S.PHON: na naun paħapuj ru s~ɕitaħuk s~ɕu raramat.
S.TRANSL: 我們準備 作菜.

TRANSL.notes: We prepare to cook some dishes (for them).

S.TRANSL: We prepare to cook some dishes .

S.FORM: ru talan ru payux ku sinbu' naha' ka para' waywak la ga paqasun nku kanayril la ga.
S.PHON: ru talan ru pajux ku s~ɕinβuʔ naħaʔ ka paraʔ wajwak la ɣa paqas~ɕun nku kanajril la ɣa.
S.FORM: ru talan ru payux ku sinbu' naha' ka para' waywak la ga paqasun nku kanayril la ga.
S.PHON: ru talan ru pajux ku s~ɕinβuʔ naħaʔ ka paraʔ wajwak la ɣa paqas~ɕun nku kanajril la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 看到他們射回那麼多獵物,有山羌和山豬,婦女們很開心.
Seeing so many animals they shot like muntjac and boar, women are so happy.

S.FORM: gi su sunga ga usu i maquwaw su quwaw na itaan ru si'agan su quwaw na itaal ru sibai naha' gi.
S.PHON: ɣi s~ɕu s~ɕuŋa ɣa us~ɕu i maquwaw s~ɕu quwaw na itaan ru s~ɕiʔaɣan s~ɕu quwaw na itaal ru s~ɕiβai naħaʔ ɣi.
S.FORM: gi su sunga ga usu i maquwaw su quwaw na itaan ru si'agan su quwaw na itaal ru sibai naha' gi.
S.PHON: ɣi s~ɕu s~ɕuŋa ɣa us~ɕu i maquwaw s~ɕu quwaw na itaan ru s~ɕiʔaɣan s~ɕu quwaw na itaal ru s~ɕiβai naħaʔ ɣi.
S.TRANSL: 因為以前會釀糯米酒,我們給他們糯米酒.

TRANSL.notes: Because (we) used to brew Atayal wine (rice wine), and we give them wine.

S.TRANSL: Because used to brew Atayal wine , and we give them wine.

S.FORM: saq saqaqasan gi gi payux ku tinruwiq naha'.
S.PHON: s~ɕaq s~ɕaqaqas~ɕan ɣi ɣi pajux ku tinruwiq naħaʔ.
S.FORM: saq saqaqasan gi gi payux ku tinruwiq naha'.
S.PHON: s~ɕaq s~ɕaqaqas~ɕan ɣi ɣi pajux ku tinruwiq naħaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 因為他們吊到很多獵物,很開心.

TRANSL.notes: because they are happy for getting so many (hanged) animals.

S.TRANSL: because they are happy for getting so many animals.

S.FORM: ru nanu' u i taqaru' i naha' i paqasi sukuun la ku tinruwiq naha' la ga nanu'.
S.PHON: ru nanuʔ u i taqaruʔ i naħaʔ i paqas~ɕi s~ɕukuun la ku tinruwiq naħaʔ la ɣa nanuʔ.
S.FORM: ru nanu' u i taqaru' i naha' i paqasi sukuun la ku tinruwiq naha' la ga nanu'.
S.PHON: ru nanuʔ u i taqaruʔ i naħaʔ i paqas~ɕi s~ɕukuun la ku tinruwiq naħaʔ la ɣa nanuʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們喝完後很開心,並把吊到的獵物分好.
After drinking the wine, they are happy, and they distribute the game they got.

S.FORM: u manabalaiq mapatisan la ru nanu' manabuwag su quwaw.
S.PHON: u manaβalaiq mapatis~ɕan la ru nanuʔ manaβuwaɣ s~ɕu quwaw.
S.FORM: u manabalaiq mapatisan la ru nanu' manabuwag su quwaw.
S.PHON: u manaβalaiq mapatis~ɕan la ru nanuʔ manaβuwaɣ s~ɕu quwaw.
S.TRANSL: 他們聊天、喝酒.
They chat and drink wine.

S.FORM: ru mahananu' ga saing su i.
S.PHON: ru maħananuʔ ɣa s~ɕaiŋ s~ɕu i.
S.FORM: ru mahananu' ga saing su i.
S.PHON: ru maħananuʔ ɣa s~ɕaiŋ s~ɕu i.
S.TRANSL: 有時候,兩個...
And sometimes, the two...

S.FORM: taqaru' la ga nanu' u mapatisan la ru.
S.PHON: taqaruʔ la ɣa nanuʔ u mapatis~ɕan la ru.
S.FORM: taqaru' la ga nanu' u mapatisan la ru.
S.PHON: taqaruʔ la ɣa nanuʔ u mapatis~ɕan la ru.
S.TRANSL: 完成後,他們互相聊天.

TRANSL.notes: After finishing (distributing the game), they chat with each other.

S.TRANSL: After finishing , they chat with each other.

S.FORM: yani la nanuwan la.
S.PHON: jani la nanuwan la.
S.FORM: yani la nanuwan la.
S.PHON: jani la nanuwan la.
S.TRANSL: 就那樣了.還有什麼嗎?
That is all. What else?

S.FORM: ru tuminun i mahananu' ga.
S.PHON: ru tuminun i maħananuʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: ru tuminun i mahananu' ga.
S.PHON: ru tuminun i maħananuʔ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 織布以及有時候...
Weaving and sometimes...

S.FORM: kinaanmu sawni la musa' ragiyax naha' cumbu' cu cu qasinu ga nanu' tuminun sami tu tuminun ru qumlasai ru muwah la ga sipahapuy.
S.PHON: kinaanmu s~ɕawni la mus~ɕaʔ raɣijax naħaʔ ʦ~ʨumβuʔ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨu qas~ɕinu ɣa nanuʔ tuminun s~ɕami tu tuminun ru qumlas~ɕai ru muwaħ la ɣa s~ɕipaħapuj.
S.FORM: kinaanmu sawni la musa' ragiyax naha' cumbu' cu cu qasinu ga nanu' tuminun sami tu tuminun ru qumlasai ru muwah la ga sipahapuy.
S.PHON: kinaanmu s~ɕawni la mus~ɕaʔ raɣijax naħaʔ ʦ~ʨumβuʔ ʦ~ʨu ʦ~ʨu qas~ɕinu ɣa nanuʔ tuminun s~ɕami tu tuminun ru qumlas~ɕai ru muwaħ la ɣa s~ɕipaħapuj.
S.TRANSL: 我剛剛說的他們去山上打獵,然後我們織布、整經,等他們回來我們就做飯.
I just talked about their going to the mountains to shoot animals, and we weave and arrange threads; when men come back, we cook for them.

S.FORM: cu yani la nanuwan la pi.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨu jani la nanuwan la pi.
S.FORM: cu yani la nanuwan la pi.
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨu jani la nanuwan la pi.
S.TRANSL: 就那樣了.還有什麼嗎?
That is all. What else?
